name: Influencer Marketing Agreement
description: A contract between a brand and an influencer outlining the terms for sponsored content creation, posting schedules, and payment.
content:
INFLUENCER MARKETING AGREEMENT

This Influencer Marketing Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between {{brand_name}} ("Brand") and {{influencer_name}} ("Influencer").

1. PARTIES

Brand:
Company Name: {{brand_name}}
Address: {{brand_address}}
Representative: {{brand_contact}}
Email: {{brand_email}}

Influencer / Creator:
Name: {{influencer_name}}
{{#if influencer_agency}}Agency/Manager: {{influencer_agency}}
{{/if}} Address: {{influencer_address}}
Social Media Handles: {{influencer_handles}}
Email: {{influencer_email}}

2. CAMPAIGN DETAILS AND DELIVERABLES

The Influencer agrees to produce and publish content (the "Deliverables") to promote the Brand's {{product_service}} across their social media platforms. The primary goal of this campaign is: {{campaign_goal}}.

Content to be Created:

{{content_deliverables}}

Campaign Duration: {{formatDate campaign_start}} to {{formatDate campaign_end}}

3. APPROVAL AND DISCLOSURE

The Influencer must submit drafts of all Deliverables to the Brand for review at least {{approval_days}} days before the scheduled posting date. The Brand will provide feedback within {{feedback_days}} days. The Influencer agrees to make reasonable revisions as requested.

The Influencer must comply with all applicable advertising laws and regulations (e.g., FTC guidelines) by clearly disclosing the material connection with the Brand using clear tags such as #ad, #sponsored, or the platform's paid partnership tools.

4. COMPENSATION

In consideration of the Deliverables, the Brand will provide compensation to the Influencer consisting of {{payment_amount}} via {{payment_type}}.

Payment Schedule: {{payment_schedule}}

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS

Ownership and usage rights for the Deliverables are as follows: {{copyright_status}}.

{{#if (eq copyright_status 'Brand owns all rights')}}

The Influencer hereby assigns to the Brand all copyrights in the Deliverables. The Brand may use, modify, and distribute the content unconditionally.

{{else}}

The Influencer retains the copyright to the Deliverables. However, the Influencer grants the Brand a non-exclusive license to use the content for {{usage_duration}} under the following conditions: {{usage_scope}}.

{{/if}}

6. MISCELLANEOUS

The Influencer shall not engage in any conduct that could negatively impact the Brand's reputation. The Influencer acts as an independent contractor under this Agreement.

By signing below, the Parties acknowledge and agree to the terms outlined herein.

Brand Representative

Signature: _________________________

{{brand_contact}}

Influencer

Signature: _________________________

{{influencer_name}}

fields.name: content_deliverables
fields.label: Deliverables (Content to be Created)
fields.placeholder: e.g., 2 Instagram Reels, 3 Stories with swipe-up link.

fields.name: campaign_goal
fields.label: Goal of the Campaign
fields.placeholder: e.g., Brand awareness, driving traffic to website.

fields.name: usage_scope
fields.label: Usage Scope (If Influencer retains rights)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Brand can repost on their own IG and run ads.
